gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps slightly closer, spreads arms wide with excitement, and smiles while showing the colorful objects
a person leans forward slightly, raises both hands invitingly, and gestures as if bringing the groups together
a tutor nods while pointing to the two groups of objects on the screen, emphasizing their importance
a person raises one hand to the side, moves it in a sweeping motion to combine the groups while engaging the learners
a tutor holds up three fingers on one hand and two on the other, then brings both hands together while counting intentionally
a person stands tall, shifts weight slightly to one foot, and looks around as if encouraging everyone to think about the total
a tutor claps hands together enthusiastically, then gestures outward invitingly, encouraging the class to count together
a person raises both arms overhead in celebration, smiling brightly while acknowledging the students' hard work with the objects
a tutor places one hand on their heart and gestures with the other hand toward the learners, emphasizing the importance of counting
